# 新闻速递 2026-03-22

## MercadoLibre
- 分析师指出MercadoLibre在拉美电商蓬勃发展下股价被低估，预示其未来价值重估与股价上涨潜力。（[News.google](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMixwFBVV95cUxPOGxZME5WajJiN0FYSXJsWHhRajVyOUVGQ0ExaGEyeDZrckZMRU5iLUN5OFFudFFZdmpud0xXZTBfVWZYeWFxa2dIUnFpRXFVMWhUY09jTnJwc0Q3WkxWUm9YeDBmRmFfcjBqcndNWndPaEFqNUtlemcyT2tZaXAxMWZwWWZjSFczYXo5QkRtRC1QTDl3VDFZdTlCSjU2M0dJODVpUmxzZWVOUTBjV0dhbHlZN2hvVG5xcUpfbzFPLTFfZ09LWk5V?oc=5)）

## AppLovin
- Wealth Enhancement Advisory Services LLC增持AppLovin 85,345股，或反映机构看好其未来表现并提振市场信心。（[News.google](https://news.google.?oc=5)）
